{{Quote|This is Piani at Communications. We've finally got that message. You'd better get down here.|Piani to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
'''Piani''' was a comely young [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]], in charge of the refugee communications center on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]<ref name="Balance Point" /> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

She had a [[Piani's son|son]] at the time, and had long, sleek hair. Her [[Piani's mate|mate]] had been left behind in the evacuation of [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]].<ref name="Balance Point" />

{{Char-stub}}
